text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With her long-awaited race debut just around the
corner, King Halo declares with a powerful and
confident laugh that she'll be the first to debut.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Amid this, we catch Grass Wonder's recent debut
being praised on a TV program playing in the
waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it turns out, King Halo wasn't the first to debut
after all. But it doesn't matter, because our goal
is to claim first place. It's time to get out there
and win!
